infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow BrickOurHouse to access your camera to upload profile pictures and documents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow BrickOurHouse to access your photos to upload documents.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow BrickOurHouse to access your location to show nearby workers on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Allow BrickOurHouse to access your location to show nearby workers on the map.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow BrickOurHouse to access your photos to upload documents and profile pictures.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow BrickOurHouse to use your camera.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow BrickOurHouse to access your location to show nearby workers on the map.
